protein_name: Binds phospholipid vesicles containing phosphatidylinositol 3-phosphate and participates in endosomal trafficking. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: axonal spine; cytoplasm; cytoplasmic vesicle; cytosol; early endosome; early endosome membrane; endosome; glutamatergic synapse; postsynaptic early endosome; Schaffer collateral - CA1 synapse
raw_fields.Molecular Function: 1-phosphatidylinositol binding; calmodulin binding; GTP-dependent protein binding; metal ion binding; protein binding; protein homodimerization activity; zinc ion binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: chemical synaptic transmission, postsynaptic; early endosome to late endosome transport; endocytosis; host-mediated perturbation of viral process; synaptic vesicle to endosome fusion; vesicle fusion
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: Early endosome antigen 1; early endosome antigen 1, 162kD; early endosome-associated protein; EEA1; Endosome-associated protein p162; MST105; MSTP105; ZFYVE2; Zinc finger FYVE domain-containing protein 2
